lo_coverage: State what MEITY is and what its 2024 AI advisories asked Indian online platforms to do, in plain words.
Explain what an advisory is, and why it is softer than a binding law like the EU AI Act (5.7).
Describe the advisories' core asks: labeling AI-generated or unreliable AI output, and due-diligence duties on platforms.
Give the one concrete example of how this guidance is evolving - the March 2024 revision that dropped the prior-permission requirement.
Explain what 'directionally aligned with global frameworks' means: India aims at the same goals as the EU and US, but so far through advisories rather than a single AI law.

questions.objective_ref: State what MEITY is and what its 2024 AI advisories asked Indian online platforms to do, in plain words.
Explain what an advisory is, and why it is softer than a binding law like the EU AI Act (5.7).
Describe the advisories' core asks: labeling AI-generated or unreliable AI output, and due-diligence duties on platforms.
Give the one concrete example of how this guidance is evolving - the March 2024 revision that dropped the prior-permission requirement.
Explain what 'directionally aligned with global frameworks' means: India aims at the same goals as the EU and US, but so far through advisories rather than a single AI law.
On the softness scale, MEITY advisories sit between voluntary guidance (NIST) and a binding law (EU AI Act) - soft 'advisory' guidance (corpus 5.5, Key Takeaways).
